name: studyreader
description: Manifest V3 Chrome extension for webpage and PDF text-to-speech study reading.

scripts.vendor:pdfjs: mkdir -p vendor/pdfjs && cp node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.mjs vendor/pdfjs/pdf.mjs && cp node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.mjs vendor/pdfjs/pdf.worker.mjs
scripts.check: node --check src/background.js && node --check src/shared-prefs.js && node --check src/shared-snippets.js && node --check src/popup.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/pdf-reader.mjs && node --check src/snippets.js
